zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Lucy於大約1387年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦本哈姆時，他的父親Reynold Lucy29歲，母親Margaret Mowbray28歲。他於1400年之前與Eleanor Archdeacon在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1419年登記服兵役。他於1415年被列為commissioner in the marches of wales。他去世於1444年10月4日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年58歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Lucy于大约1387年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦本哈姆时，他的父亲Reynold Lucy29岁，母亲Margaret Mowbray28岁。他于1400年之前与Eleanor Archdeacon在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1419年登记服兵役。他于1415年被列为commissioner in the marches of wales。他去世于1444年10月4日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年58岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Lucy was born about 1387, in Wappenham, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reynold Lucy, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Mowbray, was 28. He married Eleanor Archdeacon before 1400, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1419. In 1415, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as commissioner in the marches of wales. He died on 4 October 1444, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Lucy est né environ 1387, à Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reynold Lucy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mowbray, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Archdeacon avant 1400, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1419. En 1415, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est commissioner in the marches of wales. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1444, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Lucy um 1387 in Wappenham, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold Lucy 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Mowbray 28. Er hat vor 1400 in England Eleanor Archdeacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1419 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1415, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als commissioner in the marches of wales aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1444 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Lucy è nato il circa 1387 nel Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reynold Lucy, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mowbray, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Archdeacon prima del 1400, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1419. Nel 1415, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come commissioner in the marches of wales. Morì il 4 ottobre 1444, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Lucyが約1387年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワップエンハムで生まれた時，父Reynold Lucyは29歳，母Margaret Mowbrayは28歳であった。1400年以前にイギリスでEleanor Archdeaconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年に兵役登録をした。1415年，29歳の時，職業はcommissioner in the marches of walesと記録されている。彼は1444年10月4日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで58歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Lucy(이)가 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 왑펜함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold Lucy(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mowbray(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1400년 이전 영국에서 Eleanor Archdeacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1415년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 commissioner in the marches of wales이었다. 그는 1444년 10월 4일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reynold Lucy, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mowbray, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Archdeacon antes 1400, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1419. Em 1415, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como commissioner in the marches of wales. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1444, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Lucy родился около 1387 г. в местности ваппенам, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reynold Lucy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mowbray, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Archdeacon перед 1400 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1419 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1415 году, в возрасте 29 лет, работал по профессии commissioner in the marches of wales. Он умер 4 октября 1444 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Lucy nació aproximadamente 1387, en Wappenham, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reynold Lucy, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Mowbray, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eleanor Archdeacon antes de 1400, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1419. En 1415, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era commissioner in the marches of wales. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1444, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
